summary: Phase 3 E2E verified. Backend: 6/6 new tests pass (social/legal/news-VADER/ai-verdict-sector+disclaimer/events/red-flags). Frontend: all new panels render correctly on RELIANCE dashboard — Red Flags + Events row, Social + Legal row, Options + Insider row, AI Verdict with sector lens chip, disclaimer banner, 9-factor breakdown, sector-specific (Oil & Gas) section with 'No data available' chips. PDF export triggers download (RELIANCE-report.pdf). Legal panel header shows SCANNED: 3307 (NSE reachable, 3307 announcements scanned). Social shows all 3 blocks (Reddit unavailable per env, StockTwits HTTP 403, X discontinued). Reddit graceful-degradation confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts width=-1/height=-1 console warnings emitted during initial render before container has dimensions — harmless but noisy. Consider setting minWidth/minHeight on the ResponsiveContainer parent.
Legal classification call uses gemini-3-flash-preview without retry/backoff — if Gemini rate-limits, items[] will silently return []. Consider adding a single retry on JSON parse failure.

events_service.get_events caps at 20 items but doesn't filter out past board-meeting events (24-Apr-2026 shown for RELIANCE is past). Consider filtering events where date < today for forward-looking calendar.
red-flags endpoint re-fetches NSE announcements + screener even though /legal already fetched them this minute — share the in-memory cache key or compose internally.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_phase3.py -v. AI verdict ~25-30s (Gemini). NSE corp-announcements reachable from server (3307 RELIANCE items). Reddit intentionally disabled via empty REDDIT_CLIENT_ID/SECRET — endpoint returns {available:false, reason:...} as designed. StockTwits 403 expected (no India coverage). PDF export verified working — triggers download RELIANCE-report.pdf via html2canvas+jspdf.
rca of the issue: No bugs. All Phase 3 specs satisfied. Minor observations are enhancements (past-event filter, Gemini retry, cache reuse), non-blocking.
